image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Plates collide, pull apart, or slide — each creates unique hazards.
Context visual: These boundaries are alive with movement, shaping our planet.
Escalation visual: First, convergent boundaries: plates push together, causing intense earthquakes.
Evidence visual: Next, divergent boundaries: where plates pull apart, magma rises, creating new land.
Pattern Interrupt visual: Finally, transform boundaries: plates slide past each other, often leading to tension.
Payoff visual: Understanding these interactions helps us predict hazards and protect lives.
Cta visual: Curious to learn more about our planet? Hit that follow button!
